Motion To Set Aside Dismissal
Off Calendar Jan-03-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Richard Miller, Esq. (858) 244-7600 PATENAUDE & FELIX, A.P.C. for Plaintiff.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested/Discussed. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF NATIONAL COLLEGIATE STUDENT LOAN TRUST 2006-4's MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT CCP 664.6, AND ENTER JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to enforce settlement CCP 664.6 and enter judgment against defendant" is granted.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/rbu)
